blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 162 ft. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
